label_verbatim: FIRST: The name of the corporation is
THIRD: [X] The corporation is organized as a public benefit corporation for the following purpose or purposes:
rationale: Mutually exclusive radio option for 'public_benefit'. Reuses NP_MNPCA-6's entity.nonprofit_type enum convention rather than coining a separate entity.benefit_type — same conceptual binary on both forms.

label_verbatim: THIRD: [X] The corporation is organized as a mutual benefit corporation for the following purpose or purposes:
THIRD: ...purpose or purposes: (Public Benefit free-text block)
rationale: Free-text purpose block — populated only when entity.nonprofit_type='public_benefit'. Reuses NP_MNPCA-6's entity.public_benefit_purpose split rather than a unified entity.purpose_statement, since the form physically separates the two free-text blocks under separate checkboxes.

label_verbatim: THIRD: ...purpose or purposes: (Mutual Benefit free-text block)
rationale: Free-text purpose block — populated only when entity.nonprofit_type='mutual_benefit'. Parallel to NP_MNPCA-6's entity.mutual_benefit_purpose.

Maine municipality where the corporation is located. New schema-gap key; the modern NP_MNPCA-6 doesn't capture municipality/county directly because it uses the registered-agent address instead. This older form pre-dates the registered-agent regime.
Maine county where the corporation is located. Paired with entity.location.municipality.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: The number of officers is ___ and their names are as follows:
rationale: Numeric count of initial officers (typically 4 — President, VP, Secretary/Clerk, Treasurer). Driven by FIFTH recital.

Name of the President. Role-keyed officer slot (the form pre-defines four roles); distinct from MBCA-12's officer_N.* indexed-roster pattern (which is for foreign-qualification listings of an arbitrary current officer roster). New schema-gap family entity.officers.<role>.name for forms that pre-define officer roles inline.
Name of the Secretary or Clerk (form labels them together — 13 MRSA terminology preserved verbatim).

label_verbatim: SIXTH: The Directors or Trustees are: ___ (row 1)
rationale: First director/trustee name. Indexed roster pattern (per 2026-04-30-officer-roster-pattern.md note on subdividing 'officer_N.*' into 'director_N.*' when forms separate the two).

Entity-level contact person name. DISTINCT from filing.contact.* (cover-letter filing-correspondence contact) — entity.contact_person.* is the on-record SOS contact, analogous to NP_MNP-3's contact_change.* target.
Entity contact person's mailing address (single combined widget; no street/city split).
Entity contact person's physical address (single combined widget).
Filing signature date (top of the incorporator-signature block on page 1).

label_verbatim: (top-right of incorporator block, same y as Dated — ambiguous)
rationale: Tentatively mapped to incorporator 1 Street (right-column Street field paired with Dated's row). Widget-row count (10 rows × 2 widgets = 20) does not cleanly match the 6 visually-rendered incorporator slots × 3 widgets each + Dated = 19 expected widgets. See open_questions for the widget-count mismatch — pass-2 visual-fill testing needed.
Printed name of incorporator 1. Per-officer signer pattern (13-MRSA §901 formation filing — same shape as MBCA-6, NP_MNPCA-6). Pass-2 testing needed to confirm the row pairing of Text20-Text38.
Street of incorporator 2 (alternating-row interpretation: print_name → city/state/zip → Street → ...).

label_verbatim: (bottom-right of incorporator block — ambiguous trailing widget)
rationale: Trailing widget at the bottom of the incorporator block; provisionally mapped to a 7th incorporator slot's Street. Visual layout suggests only 6 incorporator slots — pass-2 visual-fill testing needed. May be unused or backup overflow widget.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 1
label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1 (cover-letter primitive). Note this form uses the field id 'Name of entitys on the submitted filings 1' (with explicit '1' suffix) rather than the more common 'Name of entity' — preserved upstream.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite enum value 'hold_for_pickup'. Note short field id 'hold' (vs the more common 'Check Box14') — same template-naming variation as MLLC-12's 'exp24'/'imm'.
Total fees ($5 base per page-0 header plus expedite premium).
Cover-letter contact name (distinct from entity.contact_person.* on page 1).
